arts.ttl: Barcelona star leading Arsenal’s Bukayo Saka as best key passer in Europe
arts.sum: Barcelona star Raphinha leads all players across Europe’s top-7 leagues when it comes to key passes this season. That’s according to statisticians DataMB, who have on Friday provided an insight…

arts.ttl: Which Barcelona teammate has Lamine Yamal assisted most this season?
